risks.reason: Task100B is one Light GPU condition, not a full matrix or Baseline/DFlash-normalized final benchmark.
Task100B uses deterministic GSM8K numeric proxy only.
Task100B did not run QMSum and QMSum remains diagnostic-only in project policy.
Observed VRAM is useful runtime evidence but not deployment validation.
No full matrix was run in Task100B or Task100C.
DFlash-R1 is only a historical reference here and was not rerun in Task100B.
Task100B supports bounded Light GPU candidacy, not a default config change.
Task100B still has 15/100 cap-limited incomplete rows.
Task100B still has 6/100 strict wrong numeric rows.

risks.blocked_claim: Task100B proves equal-setting superiority over Task96 references
risks.reason: Task96 light/large CPU references are n30, not equal-setting n100 comparisons.
